query: Duracell BASF trade secret lawsuit lithium-ion Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary status

{"query":"Duracell BASF trade secret lawsuit lithium-ion Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary status","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1667,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/legal/litigation/berkshires-duracell-must-face-basf-lawsuit-over-battery-secrets-us-judge-rules-2026-04-28/","title":"Berkshire's Duracell must face BASF lawsuit over battery secrets, US judge rules | Reuters","content":"April 28 (Reuters) - Duracell, the battery maker owned by Berkshire Hathaway(BRKa.N), opens new tab, must face a lawsuit accusing it of stealing trade ​secrets related to German chemical company BASF's(BASFn.DE), opens new tab lithium-ion battery ‌technology.
District Judge Gregory Williams on Tuesday rejected Duracell's bid to dismiss the April 2025 lawsuit related to BASF's years-long effort to manufacture lower-cost ​materials for high-powered batteries."},{"url":"https://uk.finance.yahoo.com/news/basf-sues-berkshires-duracell-allegedly-163838588.html","title":"BASF sues Berkshire's Duracell for allegedly stealing battery secrets","content":"In a heavily redacted complaint made public on Tuesday in Delaware federal court, BASF said the trade secrets related to its efforts over several years to manufacture lower-cost materials for high-powered batteries.
But it said Duracell misappropriated secrets while the companies had a collaboration agreement, shared details with a third party, and arranged for manufacturing under the false pretense that BASF's process came from Duracell.
Berkshire bought Duracell from Procter & Gamble for about $2.9 billion in 2016."},{"url":"https://www.claimsjournal.com/news/national/2025/04/09/329948.htm","title":"Buffett’s Duracell Sued by BASF Over Lithium Ion Battery Secrets","content":"Billionaire investor Warren Buffett’s Duracell battery maker was accused by chemical producer BASF SE of stealing trade secrets about lithium ion battery technology.
BASF, the world’s biggest chemical maker by revenue, claims in a lawsuit that Duracell, owned by Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway since 2016 – misappropriated the technology while the companies had a cooperation agreement.
“Duracell’s innovative battery chemistry was developed through years of work and significant investment by our internal R&D team and is the subject of numerous Duracell patents,” according to the statement.
BASF has launched a cost-cutting effort at its Ludwigshafen site, Europe’s biggest chemical plant, where by February it had already started closing some smaller production units, and is on track to curtail annual costs by €2.1 billion ($2.32 billion) by the end of 2026.
It claims Duracell improperly shared the technology with an unidentified third company.
Copyright 2026 Bloomberg.
Here are more articles you may enjoy."},{"url":"https://www.law360.com/articles/2471000/duracell-loses-bid-to-ax-basf-s-lithium-battery-secrets-suit","title":"Duracell Loses Bid To Ax BASF's Lithium Battery Secrets Suit - Law360 UK","content":"By Lauren Berg ( April 28, 2026, 11:40 PM EDT) -- Battery-maker Duracell cannot escape chemical company BASF Corp.'s lawsuit accusing it of stealing trade secrets about its lithium battery technology after gaining access to the information through a cooperation agreement, a Delaware federal judge ruled Tuesday....
